results.title: Manuel Neuer set to miss Bayern's DFB-Pokal final clash with Stuttgart
results.description: Bayern Munich will have to manage without Manuel Neuer when they face VfB Stuttgart in the DFB-Pokal final in Berlin on Saturday.According to Sky Germany, the 40-year-old veteran will miss the match d...

results.title: Bayern hope to avoid ‘bitter’ end as spoilers Stuttgart await in German Cup
results.description: Bayern Munich face holders Stuttgart in the German Cup final on Saturday knowing defeat will sour what had been one of their most promising seasons in recent memory. Just weeks ago, Bayern were flying high and hopeful of a treble after beating Real Madrid for the first time in over a decade, in the Champions [...] The post Bayern hope to avoid ‘bitter’ end as spoilers Stuttgart await in German Cup appeared first on The Namibian .

results.title: North Carolina Woman Flips $30 Scratcher into $100K Payout
results.description: A North Carolina woman has flipped a $30 scratcher into a $100,000 payout by playing the Cash Payday game. The woman, who purchased the ticket from the Trinity Park Family Fare on West Main Street in Durham, has already stepped forward to claim her reward.
